title: ANM Jobs 2026 – Medical Officer, Counsellor, Staff Nurse and Data Manager
org: Medical Officer, Counsellor, Staff Nurse and Data Manager
shortInfo: GGSGH Recruitment 2026 is now open for 4 Medical Officer, Counsellor, Staff Nurse and Data Manager posts for candidates with MBBS, Graduate and ANM qualifications as per post, with walk-in interview scheduled on 02-06-2026 through the official website health.delhi.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: GGSGH Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Medical Officer, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Counsellor, Staff Nurse and Data Manager
basic_details.short_information: GGSGH Recruitment 2026 is now open for 4 Medical Officer, Counsellor, Staff Nurse and Data Manager posts for candidates with MBBS, Graduate and ANM qualifications as per post, with walk-in interview scheduled on 02-06-2026 through the official website health.delhi.gov.in.

age_limit.maximum_age: Upto 64 years in case of retired Govt Servant for Medical Officer
age_limit.age_details: Upto 64 years in case of retired Govt Servant for Medical Officer
age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the GGSGH Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS from a recognized institution along with medical council Registration (Preferable: MD or equivalent qualification in Psychiatry) Counsellor: Graduate in Psychology or Social Work or Sociology (Desirable: Masters in above disciplines/ Experience one year in similar or equivalent field) Staff Nurse: ANM (Desirable: GNM/BSc Nursing/ Experience one year in similar or equivalent field) Data Manager: Graduate

vacancy_details.Post Name: Medical Officer, Counsellor, Staff Nurse and Data Manager

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for GGSGH recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the GGSGH recruitment is scheduled to be held on 02 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in the GGSGH recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the posts of Medical Officer, Counsellor, Staff Nurse, and Data Manager in the Guru Gobind Singh Government Hospital.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized institution along with medical council registration. A preference will be given to those with an MD or equivalent qualification in Psychiatry.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the GGSGH recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this GGSGH recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Staff Nurse position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 30,240/-. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the GGSGH recruitment involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Guru Gobind Singh Government Hospital (GGSGH) office. The specific address and reporting time will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: While no specific minimum or maximum age limit is generally mentioned for most posts, there is a relaxation up to 64 years for retired Government Servants applying for the Medical Officer position.

faq.question: Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the positions advertised by Guru Gobind Singh Government Hospital (GGSGH) are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.
